raw_title: Predictive Data Stories: Characterizing a Nascent Data-Journalistic Genre
title_en: Predictive Data Stories: Characterizing a Nascent Data-Journalistic Genre
title_zh: 预测性数据故事：描述一种新兴的数据新闻类型
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了一种新兴的新闻类型——预测性数据故事，它结合了数据分析和预测模型来讲述未来可能发生的事件。文章旨在描述这种类型的特征，帮助理解它在数字新闻中的发展和应用。
plain_summary_en: This study explores an emerging journalistic genre called predictive data stories, which combines data analysis and predictive models to narrate potential future events. It aims to characterize this genre, helping to understand its development and application in digital journalism.
research_direction_zh: 研究聚焦于数字新闻中新兴的数据驱动叙事形式，特别是如何利用预测性分析来创新新闻报道，探索新闻类型在技术变革中的演变。
research_direction_en: The research focuses on emerging data-driven narrative forms in digital journalism, particularly how predictive analysis can innovate news reporting, exploring the evolution of journalistic genres amid technological changes.
